• Org Sustainability Investors Give us your Feedback Sitemap Legal Terms of Service Privacy Information Responsible Disclosure Trust Contact Manage Preferences University Overview Interns New Grads Advanced Degrees Associate Program Manager.

• Remain current on the cutting edge of AI technologies and patterns and incorporate them into the Activation Team’s work by example and through instructionDefine reusable patterns and implementations for agent skills, guardrails, and multi-agent collaboration and contemporary developments in the field of AI.
• 5+ years of relevant professional experience in a technical pre-sales or consulting role, with a focus on enterprise architecture.
• Experience with Salesforce D360 (formerly Data Cloud)Deep experience and expertise with Salesforce Service Cloud and Field Service Lightning implementations.
• Understanding and experience in working on distributed systemsUnderstanding of modern AI (including but not limited to LLMs, regression models, statistical models, human-in-the-loop, fine-tuning, prompt and context engineering, MCP, A2A)Experience designing, developing, and maintaining RESTful servicesUnderstanding of vibe coding and its place in modern software development (e.
• , Claude code, Cursor, rulesets, and supporting patterns)Experience with RAG architecturesExperience with public cloud infrastructure - AWS/Azure/GCPExperience integrating LLMs and AI services into enterprise applications.
• Proven experience in architecting and delivering large-scale enterprise solutions.
• Security concepts (mTLS, PKI, OAuth/SAML etc)Experience with open source projects and community developmentDemonstrated experience learning new technologies quickly Hands-on experience with Agentforce / conversational AI / intelligent agents.
• Experience with NoSQL such as Cassandra, HBase and/or document store such as Elastic SearchKnowledge/Contribution to open source technologyNative Windows, Mac, and/or Linux development experienceExperience with distributed caching and load balancing systemsPossession of relevant Salesforce certifications, such as Service Cloud Consultant or Field Service Lightning Consultant Certifications.
